problem id: 6570b28c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  01000010 -> 00000000
  11111101 -> 11000001
  10110000 -> 00000001
  01111011 -> 10010000
  10110001 -> 00000001
  01111100 -> 11000000
  01001110 -> 01100000
  01100010 -> 00000000
  10010011 -> 00010000

query: 00110100
predicted answer: 00000000
